channel.title: v2ray on yy小站
channel.description: Recent content in v2ray on yy小站

item.title: 懂的都懂不解释
item.description: 基础配置 安装docker和nginx 略… ssl泛域名证书和cloudflare 略… BBR and TFO https://wiki.crowncloud.net/?How_to_enable_BBR_on_Debian_11 https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/what-is-tcp-fast-open/ 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 sudo tee
